title: El secreto
overview: Gaspar Urbieta works as a typographer in Maracaibo. The National Guard convinces him to infiltrate an organization of  Colombian gold smugglers. Gaspar will experience situations of fear, humour, intrigue and romance with a beautiful and enigmatic blonde. His secret will be so incredible that if he told it, no one would believe it!
